tools.name: suggest_answerthepublic
tools.description:
Use this tool when the user needs keyword overview data from AnswerThePublic.
This tool prepares the widget and instructions; it does not run AnswerThePublic on the user's behalf.

If user is on free tier, keep in mind following limitations.
FREE TIER LIMITATIONS:
- only 1 search per day if unregistered, 3 if registered.
- Related Keyword ideas metrics (Volume and CPS) are throttled
- For Suggested AI Prompts sentiment and brands of each prompt are hidden
- Only for 3/10 of Organic search queries the Volume and CPS are shown
- No export of results
- CPS and Volume of Social media and Shopping queries are throttled


SERVICE OUTPUT VALUES:
1. Summary:
   - Search Volume with Low/Medium/High indicator
   - Cost Per Click with Low/Medium/High indicator
   - Keyword ideas grouped by intent (Search optimization, AI optimization, Social Media, Shoping)
    with volume and CPS for each suggested keyword.
    It is an aggregation of all the information below as a visual graph (no new data).
2. Suggested AI propmts to optimize for (for GEO)
   - Prompt (query text)
   - Intent
   - Sentiment
   - Brands mentioned
3. Organic Searches (Google/Bing):
   - Suggested query variations
   - Modifiers (Modifiers refine search data based on user intent)
   - Volume
   - CPC
4. People Also Ask (from Google):
   - Questions organized in tree/list format
5. Social Media (YouTube/TikTok/Instagram):
   - Keywords
   - Modifiers
   - Volume
   - CPC
6. Shopping (Amazon):
   - Keywords
   - Modifiers
   - Volume
   - CPC

Before calling this tool, explain to the user:
1. What hypothesis or question you are exploring with this service
2. What specific insights you expect to gather
3. That this tool only prepares a widget and the user runs the external service themselves

If the research workflow has not been started yet, call start_research first.

tools.name: suggest_ubersuggest_keyword_overview
tools.description:
Use this tool when the user needs keyword overview data from Ubersuggest
This tool prepares the widget and deep link; it does not run Ubersuggest on the user's behalf.

The server generates a link to Ubersuggest "AI Keyword Overview" page with the provided parameters.

FREE TIER LIMITATIONS:
- Registered free user have 3 searches per day.
- Prompts Intent is not shown

SERVICE OUTPUT VALUES:
- Keyword Search Volumne for the last month
 (The number of searches this particular keyword has during a month in the selected location.)
- SEO Difficulty
 (estimated competition in organic search, the higher the number the more competitive.)
- Top Pages Backlinks
 (The average number of backlinks the top 10 ranking domains have.
 This shows you the link-building effort typically needed to rank on Google's page one)
- Prompts Intent (hidden for free users, Combined intent from all generated prompts loaded below.)
    - Warning: It is AI-Summary, not a raw data
- Search Intent
 (refers to the purpose behind a user’s search query.
 It reveals what the user hopes to accomplish, such as getting information,
 locating a service, downloading a resource, or purchasing products.).
 Note: Search intent is hidden in a seprate tab, so simple ctrl-A will not capture it.
 If you need it - explicitly ask user to switch to "Search Intent" tab before copy-pasting.
    - Warning: It is AI-Summary, not a raw data
- AI Prompt Ideas
 (Most relevant AI prompt ideas based on your keyword.
 Use these to discover content opportunities by checking brands mentioned, search intent, and sources.)
- Keyword Ideas
 (Learn how people search for keywords related to your business.
 Uncover valuable keyword variations for your SEO strategy that other competitors aren't targeting.)
    - For each keyword there is a volume
    - There are 4 groups of keyword ideas (5 keywords per group):
        - Google Autocomplete
        - Questions
        - Prepositions
        - Comparisons

Before calling this tool, explain to the user:
1. What hypothesis or question you are exploring with this service
2. What specific insights you expect to gather
3. That this tool only prepares a widget and the user runs the external service themselves

If the research workflow has not been started yet, call start_research first.

tools.name: suggest_sparktoro
tools.description:
Use this tool when the user needs audience data from SparkToro.
This tool prepares the widget and audience description; it does not run SparkToro on the user's behalf.

INPUT:
- Provide one free-form natural-language audience description, 1-500 characters.
- SparkToro accepts interests, behaviors, job titles, website visits, URLs, and any descriptive audience language in the same input box.
- Examples:
    - "Finance executives at companies with $5M+ in annual revenue"
    - "Visits the website sparktoro.com"
- The widget opens SparkToro. The user manually pastes this audience description into SparkToro's form.

FREE TIER LIMITATIONS:
- Registered free user have 5 searches per month
- Export results to file is not available

SERVICE OUTPUT VALUES:
- Overview tab (the only tab available in free version)
    - Approximate amount of searches per month
    - Websites visited by your audience
        - Top-6 Highest affinity websites 
            - Website affinity
            - Domain authority
            - Est. Visits/Month
        - 4 "hidden gems" websites
            - Website affinity
            - Domain authority
            - Est. Visits/Month
- "Demographics_Geography" tab (hidden in free version)
    - State and City distribution
- "Demographics_Gender_and_Age" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Age distribution
- "Demographics_Bio_Profile_terms" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Bio Keywords with affinity, volume and cost-per-click (top 25 for free version, more for paid)
- "Demographics_Job_and_Salary" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Salary distribution
    - Years of experience distribution
    - Job Roles
    - Employer industries
- "Demographics_Skills_and_Education" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Most mentioned skills
    - Education type
    - Education majors
    - Most mentioned schools
- "Platforms_Social_Networks" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Network Usage Data (top 7 major networks visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - Network name and description
        - Audience Usage % (percentage of target audience using this platform)
        - US Avg Usage % (average usage percentage in US)
        - Audience vs US Avg (over/under-indexing percentage)
- "Platforms_Search_and_AI_Tools" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Search & AI Tools Usage Data (top 7 tools visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - The same information for each tool as for Network Usage Data
- "Platforms_Productivity_apps" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Productivity App Usage Data
        - The same information for each app as for Network Usage Data
- "Platforms_Entertainment" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Entertainment App Usage Data
        - The same information for each app as for Network Usage Data
- "Platforms_Lifestyle" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Lifestyle App Usage Data
        - The same information for each app as for Network Usage Data
- "Platforms_Finance" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Finance App Usage Data
        - The same information for each app as for Network Usage Data
- "Platforms_Sport" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Sport App Usage Data
        - The same information for each app as for Network Usage Data
        - Audience Usage % (percentage of target audience using this app)
        - US Avg Usage % (average usage percentage in US)
        - Audience vs US Avg (over/under-indexing percentage)
- "Platforms_E_Commerce" tab (hidden in free version)
    - E-Commerce App Usage Data
        - The same information for each app as for Network Usage Data
- "Websites_High_Affinity" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Website Affinity Data (25 websites visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - Domain name and description
        - Affinity (0-100) - how strongly this audience associates with this website
        - Traffic - estimated monthly visits
        - Domain Authority (0-100) - SEO authority score
        - Change in Affinity from previous quarter (percentage)
- "Websites_Hidden_Gems" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Website Hidden Gem Data (25 websites visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - The same information for each website as for High Affinity tab
- "Websites_Press_and_Media" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Press and Media Data (25 websites visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - The same information for each website as for High Affinity tab
- "Websites_All" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Joint table of the most popular websites regardless of type (25 websites visible in free tier, more for paid)
        - The same information for each website as for High Affinity tab
- "Youtube" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Youtube Channel Data (4 channels visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - Channel name and description
        - Affinity (0-100) - how strongly this audience associates with this channel
        - Subscribers
        - Average number of views
        - Last Video date
- "Podcasts" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Podcast Data (4 podcasts visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - Podcast name and description
        - Affinity (0-100) - how strongly this audience associates with this podcast
        - Number of episodes
        - Last podcast date
- "Search_Keywords" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Search Keyword Data (25 keywords visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - Keyword phrase
        - Affinity (0-100) - how strongly this audience searches for this keyword
        - Volume - monthly search volume
        - CPC - cost per click for advertising (may be missing, shown as $-)
        - Volume History (visual chart only, not text-extractable)
- "Trending_Keywords" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Trending Keyword Data (25 keywords visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - The same information for each keyword as for Search Keywords tab
- "Keywords_SERP_Features" tab (hidden in free version)
    - SERP Feature Data (5 major features visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - Feature type (e.g., Related Searches, Featured Snippet, Image Pack, Sitelinks)
        - Audience SERPs % (percentage of audience searches showing this feature)
        - US SERPs % (percentage of US average searches showing this feature)
        - +/- Vs. US (over/under-indexing percentage)
- "Relevant_Topics" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Topic Data (only 1 topic visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - Topic name/phrase
        - Affinity (0-100) - how strongly this audience associates with this topic
        - Saturation (0-100) - likely indicates topic saturation/competitiveness
- "Topics_Content_Ideas" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Idea Data (only 1 idea visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - Idea name/phrase
        - Affinity (0-100) - how strongly this audience associates with this idea
- "Topics_Ranking_Pages" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Ranking Page Data (4 pages visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - Page title
        - Page URL
        - Page description/snippet
        - Affinity (0-100) - how strongly this audience associates with this page
        - Avg Rank - average ranking position in search results
        - Ranking Keywords - number of keywords this page ranks for
- "Topics_Related_Questions" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Related Question Data (26 questions visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - Question phrase (e.g., "How many Fortune 500 companies have failed?")
        - Affinity (0-100) - how strongly this audience asks this question
- "Social_Accounts_All" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Social Account Data (26 accounts visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - Account name and handle
        - Account description/bio
        - Affinity (0-100) - how strongly this audience follows this account
        - SparkScore (0-100) - likely indicates account influence/quality
        - Est. Social Followers - estimated follower range
- "Social_Accounts_Hidden_Gems" tab (hidden in free version)
    - Hidden Gem Data (25 accounts visible in free tier, more for paid):
        - The same information for each account as for Social Accounts All tab
- "Social_Accounts_Reddit" tab (hidden in free version)
    - SubReddit Data (only 4 subreddits visible in free tier, heavily restricted):
        - Subreddit name and title
        - Subreddit URL path (e.g., /r/webdev/)
        - Subreddit description
        - Affinity (0-100) - how strongly this audience participates in this subreddit
        - Members - number of subreddit members

Do not assume the user has a paid SparkToro subscription unless they say so.
If the needed data is only available on a paid SparkToro plan, explain that limitation before continuing.

Before calling this tool, explain to the user:
1. What hypothesis or question you are exploring with this service
2. What specific insights you expect to gather
3. That this tool only prepares a widget and the user runs the external service themselves

If the research workflow has not been started yet, call start_research first.

tools.name: start_research
tools.description:
Use this tool when the user wants to start or restart a guided market research workflow.

It returns the research instructions and explains how the other tools fit into the workflow.
